channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-06-28 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [06/28] Dormont Pride in the Park
item.description:
Returning to Dormont Park on Sunday June 28!

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] CLP Main Percussion Jam @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:
Monthly Percussion Jam Session Series

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Hell in a Cell Anniversary Show: Fuzznaut, Old Dream, Moemaw Naedon, Terminal Stare @ Shred Shed
item.description:
An all-ages afternoon show at the Shred Shed celebrating the 28th anniversary of WWE's King of the Ring Hell in a Cell match with live bands and a DJ set.

Venue: Shred Shed

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Empty Heaven / Life Accident / Pluto in Furs / Burnt Feathers at Blood Garden @ Blood Garden
item.description:
A house show in Troy Hill featuring Chicago prog pop solo piano and three Pittsburgh acts spanning post rock, trip hop, baritone croon, and noise electronics.

Venue: Blood Garden

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Rugg-A-Palooza II: Judgement Day @ Ruggers
item.description:
Blackseed Services presents Rugg-A-Palooza II: Judgement Day, a free multi-band rock showcase at Ruggers in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Ruggers

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/28] Oracle Plus, Evil Curtain, Bella Figlia @ Telephone
item.description:
A surrealist theater and music night featuring Oracle Plus from NM, Evil Curtain of 7d, and Bella Figlia at Telephone Bar in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Telephone

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/29] Heavy Peasant, Better Plastic, Challice, Urns @ The Government Center
item.description:
NYC-based noisepunk/hardcore/powerviolence trio Better Plastic is on tour with Challice &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; will be joined by locals Urns and Heavy Peasant

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/29] An Evening with Souled American @ Spirit
item.description:
Legendary alt-country band Souled American performs an intimate evening show at Spirit Lodge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/30] World Literature: Rodrigo Hasbún’s “The Invisible Years” (Bolivia) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
English PEN Award winner Rodrigo Hasbún and moderator Anderson Tepper dive into the secrets and shrapnel of a 20-year-old friendship ripped apart in Rodrigo’s new novel.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/30] Earl Sweatshirt & MIKE - On The Orange Tour @ Roxian Theater
item.description:
Earl Sweatshirt and MIKE live at Roxian Theater with Harrison (Surf Gang).

Venue: Roxian Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/01] Keep On Hoping Tour - Sunflower Summit with Big Ruth / Almost Exactly Like Julia / Sports Radio @ The Government Center
item.description:
Sunflower Summit (she/they) is a queer Latinx Chicago based artist, writing and performing music that hits right in the feels.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/01] Deep AF with Cortisoul & DJ Rave Matthews Band @ The Government Center
item.description:
A Celebration of Deep House Jams - First Weds of the Month!

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/01] ELIXR @ Goldmark
item.description:
ELIXR is a monthly club night at The Goldmark featuring DJs Eryn Evans, Subdrip, Disco Pope, and Esoterics.

Venue: Goldmark

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] Inside Out Night @ Carnegie Museum of Art
item.description:
A curated DJ night at Carnegie Museum of Art featuring Ricky Mawzlin, Madame Trio, Keebs, TIZA, and special guest Kelman Duran.

Venue: Carnegie Museum of Art

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] July 2nd: Community Against Cancer Benefit Emo Show @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Emo show at the Mr. Roboto Project to benefit the Woodward family's cancer treatment fund, ft. Short Fictions, Kwarter Zip, Trace Remains, Hey! TV Boy! (FL), and Spit Vision (NY).

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] Two of Anything + Christopher Hoffman Solo Cello @ Baum Baum Club
item.description:
An intimate evening of avant-garde and experimental music featuring Two of Anything and Christopher Hoffman on solo cello at Baum Baum Club in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Baum Baum Club

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/02] E_DEATH, hazelboy, wax cat & DJ hare Apollo at Remedy @ Remedy
item.description:
A calender of events, concerts, club nights, weekly and monthly events series, promoters, artists, producers, djs, venues and other entities.

Venue: Remedy

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/03] Blue Film Screening @ Stay Gold Books
item.description:
Come see the Pittsburgh premiere of Eric Tuttle's provocative debut!

Venue: Stay Gold Books

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/03] Jellyfish w/ SIC.CLUB.CDMX @ Side Quest
item.description:
A multi-artist club night featuring DJs, live performances, and projections at Sidequest in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/03] Jaguar w/ Keebs, Rojo, Cosmic Drip @ Spirit
item.description:
Persona presents Jaguar, a dance night at Spirit featuring Keebs, Rojo, Cosmic Drip, Repeat Offender, and Dave Clevr.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/04] DSBBQ IV @ Polish Hell Oubliette
item.description:
Fourth annual DSBBQ heavy music outdoor gathering featuring metal and doom acts at Polish Hell Oubliette.

Venue: Polish Hell Oubliette

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/04] The Sex Room: Anthrocon 2026 @ Roboto Project
item.description:
DIY furry music party

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/04] Noche Gótica @ Squirrel Hill Sports Bar
item.description:
A dark Latin dance party celebrating Latin goth, darkwave, electro, and industrial artists at The Gloom Room.

Venue: Squirrel Hill Sports Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/04] Tails From The Cryptid @ Hot Mass
item.description:
Dog Noise presents a late-night electronic dance event at Hot Mass featuring Justin Cudmore, Rojo, and Ballooney Tunes.

Venue: Hot Mass

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/05] Gadget Playground @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:
Monthly Event Series Focused on Electronic Music Production

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/05] Painting with Paul @ Spirit
item.description:
A rooftop painting session with Paul featuring a $25 paint kit included.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/05] ...By The Deed EP Release Show: A Benefit for Families Impacted by ICE @ Spirit
item.description:
All-ages hardcore benefit show featuring ...By The Deed's EP release, Body Farm, Bolt Action, Wrung, and more at Spirit Music Hall.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/05] Lonely No More featuring Zonamorta @ Apteka
item.description:
with DJs Zonamorta spinning dark wave, post-punk, new wave, and electro.

Venue: Apteka

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/07] Alamoans, High Ideals, Wasted Boys, The Kron @ 40th Street Bridge Park
item.description:
A raw punk and rock show featuring Alamoans, High Ideals, Wasted Boys, and The Kron under the 40th Street Bridge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: 40th Street Bridge Park

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/07] Story Club PGH Presents: Story Slam! (Breaking Point) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Share the story of when you reached your Breaking Point this July at Story Club PGH’s Story Slam, for the chance to win prizes and storytelling glory!

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/07] Three Holes Goes to Hollywood @ Glitterbox Theater
item.description:
A guest clown show from Philly by Mitchell Ryan, performed at Glitterbox Theater.

Venue: Glitterbox Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Artist in Exile: Mai Khôi & the Dissidents (Vietnamese Pop) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Award-winning singer, composer, and activist Mai Khôi and her group the Dissidents, featuring Mark Michelli, Jeff Siegfried, Eli Namay, and PJ Roduta, take to the Alphabet City stage for a farewell concert.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Something Missing with Heading North, Jade Eye & Print! @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Something Missing headlines a multi-act night at Mr. Roboto Project with Heading North and Jade Eye &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Print!

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Ray Keith: Dread Recordings @ Side Quest
item.description:
Drum &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; bass legend Ray Keith of Dread Recordings plays Side Quest in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Thursday Night Jazz: Kente Summer Madness Presents the Mark Strickland Quartet @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Mark Strickland kicks off the three-part Kente Summer Madness jazz series, leading a killer quartet this summer at City of Asylum.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Willis: Live '26 Tour @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Willis brings their Live '26 Tour to Thunderbird Music Hall on July 9th, 2026, with local support.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Hannah Juanita, Mose Wilson & Ramona and the Holy Smokes @ Club Cafe
item.description:
A Country &amp;amp;amp;amp; Western night at Club Cafe featuring Hannah Juanita, Mose Wilson, and Ramona &amp;amp;amp;amp; The Holy Smokes.

Venue: Club Cafe

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] North Side Music Festival @ The Government Center
item.description:
A three-day outdoor music festival on Pittsburgh's North Side, July 10–12, 2026.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] The House Center @ The Government Center
item.description:
A free all-night house music event at The Government Center as part of Northside Fest, featuring DJ Scotty C, ProdByAJ, Dex, and Champs.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Fill the Bukit! @ Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)
item.description:
A benefit show for Bukit Bail Fund

Venue: Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] The BedHeads, Wizards Is Crazy, Shakira Chenchilla at Mr. Roboto Project @ Mr. Roboto Project
item.description:
A three-band indie/DIY rock show at Mr. Roboto Project featuring The BedHeads, Wizards Is Crazy, and Shakira Chenchilla.

Venue: Mr. Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Pittsburgh Honky Tonk 90s Night featuring Jon Bindley & The Steel Cowboys @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

item.title: [07/10] Kumarion @ Side Quest
item.description:
Kumarion headlines Sidequest on 44th with support from Kilo, Mike V, and Drucifer.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] SPIN @ The Eagle
item.description:
Monthly Dance Experience featuring 11 DJs and producers for a 6-hour night of electronic music.

Venue: The Eagle

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Bloodrave: Daywalker Party @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A goth, techno, and industrial rave under the Homestead Bridge featuring DJs, guitars, dancers, and freaks.

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Pet Peeves / Negligible Wound x Slacking / That Like This / Johnny Arlett @ Maple Leaf
item.description:
A night of no-wave, noise, and improvised music at The Maple Leaf in Millvale featuring four acts including Chicago's Pet Peeves.

Venue: Maple Leaf

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Wage Cage, Placid State, Gruitus, Geese Teeth @ 222 Ormsby
item.description:
A four-band underground rock show at 222 Ormsby in Pittsburgh for $10.

Venue: 222 Ormsby

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Fringe Country @ Club Cafe
item.description:
A night of fem-led country music from traditional to fringe, presented by Women of Country PGH at Club Cafe.

Venue: Club Cafe

item.title: [07/11] HEX APPEAL X BLOODRAVE: THE AFTERS @ Club Pittsburgh
item.description:
